response.justification: Currently Staff Engineer at re:cinq with 10+ years of proven full-stack experience directly matching core requirements: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS at scale. Recent work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks aligns perfectly with the role's emerging AI-agent development requirement. Primary framework gaps (Nest.js, Vitest) are minor relative to deep backend/frontend mastery and demonstrated ability to rapidly master new tech stacks.
strengths: Current Staff Engineer with direct experience in required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS CDK, MongoDB)
AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development at re:cinq directly addresses the role's AI-agent requirement
20-year progressive career with proven ability to architect and deliver at scale across multiple languages and frameworks
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite being the primary backend framework
Vitest not called out, though strong testing background with TDD practices and testing framework experience
Kubernetes orchestration experience not detailed, though Docker and containerization expertise confirmed

key_factors.factor: Nest.js and Vitest framework specificity gaps
